---
description: This file describes the instructions for working on the LaTeX template for theses and reports at TH Nürnberg.
applyTo: "**/*.tex,**/*.bib,!expose/**"
---

# LaTeX Template for Theses and Reports at TH Nürnberg

- You are working on a LaTeX document for theses and reports.
- The template is designed to be used by students at the TH Nürnberg.
- When working on the template, keep in mind the class options defined in `document.tex` regarding the language and purpose of the document.

## Formatting and Style

- Each sentence should be on a separate line to make it easier to see differences using version control.
- You are working on a document that must use consistent language and meet the technical depth expected of a thesis.
